full_text: Next I am going to solve my practice question number 5. Question 5 is that, Print the following on the screen using my heading tag. I have to print this line in my H1 tag. It says the sky is cloudy and after cloudy, it is showing me a cloud type symbol. And it will rain. After rain, it is showing me an umbrella type symbol. It is a rain on the umbrella. So all these things are normal characters. This is not a normal character. This is an ant symbol. This is also an HTML entity. To print the amp, I have to write the amp. So let's search rain and umbrella HTML entity. Okay. I got this in the same first go. This is 9748. Let's write this here. Or the old one. I will write here. Hash 9748. Semicode.
